description: Fix 4 remaining issues from v2 review: global random state pollution, sentinel protocol fragility, perplexity punctuation artifacts, and compound aggression gating.
steps: Replace global random.seed/random.X calls with self.rng instance in stage_structural.py
Replace global random.seed/random.X calls with self.rng instance in stage_lexical.py
Replace global random.seed/random.X calls with self.rng instance in stage_perplexity.py
Replace global random.seed/random.X calls with self.rng instance in stage_postprocess.py
Fix app.py sentinel handling to append chunks instead of assign
Fix perplexity _complexify_sentence to check adjacent punctuation before insertion
Simplify lexical aggression gating to remove compound probability
acceptance_criteria: No NLP stage modifies the global random state
Each stage uses self.rng = random.Random(seed) for all random operations
Post-sentinel chunks are appended not assigned in app.py
Perplexity complexification does not produce double commas or dash-adjacent-punctuation
Lexical replacement rate matches aggression value directly without compound gating
verification: python -c "from humanizer.pipeline import HumanizationPipeline; p1 = HumanizationPipeline(intensity=4, stage_overrides={'llm_rewrite': False}, seed=42); p2 = HumanizationPipeline(intensity=4, stage_overrides={'llm_rewrite': False}, seed=42); sample='The algorithm demonstrates significant improvements in performance metrics.'; assert p1.process(sample) == p2.process(sample); print('Reproducibility OK')"

python -c "import random; random.seed(99); from humanizer.stage_structural import StructuralVariation; s = StructuralVariation(aggression=0.5, seed=42); s.process('Test sentence here. Another sentence to process.'); val = random.random(); random.seed(99); expected = random.random(); assert val == expected; print('No global state pollution')"
timeout 10 streamlit run app.py --server.headless true 2>&1 | head -10
